title: bitwarden: accesses #[doc(hidden)] client.internal field
description: build_authed_client accesses client.internal.get_access_token_organization() which is a #[doc(hidden)] pub field in the bitwarden SDK. This is a maintenance timebomb: the SDK can remove or rename this field in a minor/patch release without it being a breaking change per semver, and the compile error will be silent until CI fails. Need to find a stable SDK API for getting the org ID, or pin the exact SDK version and document the constraint.
